category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU findutils is a collection of find, xargs, and locate; official GNU manual documents utilities for finding files and acting on them.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page and manual use GNU findutils; source_facts.name is findutils.
docs_sources: Official GNU project page links documentation; official GNU manual documents find, locate, and xargs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU findutils page states source code is available via git on Savannah.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists GNU find, xargs, and locate; official GNU manual describes file-search utilities and related operations.
